title: Shelling on residential area
title_en: Shelling on residential area
title_uk: Обстріли житлових масивів
description: Rinat Akhmetov will buy an apartment for the scientist Mykhailo Vysotsky, whose house was destroyed by a Russian rocket. The tragedy happened on July 2, during massive shelling, one of the rockets hit the apartment building where the scientist lived. He and his family survived. The fire also destroyed a unique 150-year-old family archive: books, paintings by famous Ukrainian artists, family photos and scientific works...
description_en: Rinat Akhmetov will buy an apartment for the scientist Mykhailo Vysotsky, whose house was destroyed by a Russian rocket. The tragedy happened on July 2, during massive shelling, one of the rockets hit the apartment building where the scientist lived. He and his family survived. The fire also destroyed a unique 150-year-old family archive: books, paintings by famous Ukrainian artists, family photos and scientific works...
description_uk: Рінат Ахметов придбає квартиру науковцю Михайлу Висоцькому, житло якого зруйнувала російська ракета Трагедія сталась 2-го липня, під час масованого обстрілу, одна із ракет влучила в багатоквартирний будинок, де проживав науковець. Він та його рідні вціліли. Вогонь, також, знищив унікальний сімейний 150-річний архів: книги, картини відомих українських художників, сімейні світлини та наукові праці...

title: Together with the President of the European Commission, Ursula von...

description: Together with the President of the European Commission, Ursula von der Leyen, they spoke with representatives of the mass media. They talked about the European Union's support for Ukraine, our further cooperation and joint decisions that strengthen Ukraine. I am grateful to the European Union for its record-breaking support for Ukraine - truly leading financial, political, and defense assistance. It is the European package of financial support in the amount of 90...
description_en: Together with the President of the European Commission, Ursula von der Leyen, they spoke with representatives of the mass media. They talked about the European Union's support for Ukraine, our further cooperation and joint decisions that strengthen Ukraine. I am grateful to the European Union for its record-breaking support for Ukraine - truly leading financial, political, and defense assistance. It is the European package of financial support in the amount of 90...
description_uk: Разом із Президенткою Європейської комісії Урсулою фон дер Ляєн поспілкувалися з представниками ЗМІ. Говорили про підтримку України з боку Європейського Союзу, нашу подальшу співпрацю та спільні рішення, які зміцнюють Україну. Я вдячний Євросоюзу за рекордну підтримку для України – справді лідерську фінансову, політичну, оборонну допомогу. Саме європейський пакет фінансової підтримки обсягом 90...

description: Update: Ukraine expects to gain capability to produce Patriot missiles by end of 2026, Zelensky says. "We expect that by the end of 2026, our Ukrainian team will have the technical capability to produce U.S. missiles," President Volodymyr Zelensky said on July 15.
description_en: Update: Ukraine expects to gain capability to produce Patriot missiles by end of 2026, Zelensky says. "We expect that by the end of 2026, our Ukrainian team will have the technical capability to produce U.S. missiles," President Volodymyr Zelensky said on July 15.

description: Ukraine is building its own ballistics and deep strikes for the first time. And these are not just developments, but a real force that is already working and that overcomes distances that were previously unreachable. 2884 kilometers. This is the distance from here to the Omsk Refinery. Historical distance, historical accuracy. And unlike Russia, which is at war with residential buildings, schools and churches, Ukraine is hitting Putin's "sponsors" in this war and the tools that help him...
description_en: Ukraine is building its own ballistics and deep strikes for the first time. And these are not just developments, but a real force that is already working and that overcomes distances that were previously unreachable. 2884 kilometers. This is the distance from here to the Omsk Refinery. Historical distance, historical accuracy. And unlike Russia, which is at war with residential buildings, schools and churches, Ukraine is hitting Putin's "sponsors" in this war and the tools that help him...
description_uk: Україна вперше будує свою балістику й дипстрайки. І це не просто розробки, а реальна сила, яка вже працює і яка долає відстані, недосяжні раніше. 2884 кілометри. Це відстань звідси до Омського НПЗ. Історична дистанція, історична точність. І на відміну від Росії, яка воює з житловими будинками, школами і храмами, Україна б’є по «спонсорах» Путіна у цій війні та інструментах, які допомагають йому...

title: Kyiv: Together with the leaders and representatives of the countries of...
title_en: Kyiv: Together with the leaders and representatives of the countries of...
title_uk: Київ: Разом з лідерами та представниками країн...
description: Together with the leaders and representatives of the countries of Southeast Europe and Ursula von der Leyen, they honored the memory of our fallen soldiers. We thank each and every one of you for starting your visit on the Day of Ukrainian Statehood and the Day of Baptism of Kyivan Rus - Ukraine out of respect for Ukrainian heroes. Eternal respect to Ukrainian men and women who gave their lives for the independence of Ukraine and the security of all of Europe.
description_en: Together with the leaders and representatives of the countries of Southeast Europe and Ursula von der Leyen, they honored the memory of our fallen soldiers. We thank each and every one of you for starting your visit on the Day of Ukrainian Statehood and the Day of Baptism of Kyivan Rus - Ukraine out of respect for Ukrainian heroes. Eternal respect to Ukrainian men and women who gave their lives for the independence of Ukraine and the security of all of Europe.
description_uk: Разом з лідерами і представниками країн Південно-Східної Європи та Урсулою фон дер Ляєн вшанували памʼять наших загиблих воїнів. Ми дякуємо кожному й кожній за те, що розпочали свій візит у День Української Державності і День хрещення Київської Русі – України з поваги до українських героїв. Вічна шана українцям і українкам, що віддали життя заради незалежності України й безпеки всієї Європи.

title: Strike confirmed
title_en: Strike confirmed
title_uk: Страйк підтверджено
description: 🤬Belarusian gunman Lukashenko seems to have turned on the repeaters again. The adviser to the Minister of Defense "Flash" writes that the morning attack of the Shahed jet on the gas station in Malyna could have been carried out through repeaters on the territory of Belarus. From the point of impact to the border of the Russian Federation is about 260 km, which is too far for the stable operation of a direct radio channel. At the same time, other drones that could perform the role of air...
description_en: 🤬Belarusian gunman Lukashenko seems to have turned on the repeaters again. The adviser to the Minister of Defense "Flash" writes that the morning attack of the Shahed jet on the gas station in Malyna could have been carried out through repeaters on the territory of Belarus. From the point of impact to the border of the Russian Federation is about 260 km, which is too far for the stable operation of a direct radio channel. At the same time, other drones that could perform the role of air...
description_uk: 🤬Белорусский драник Лукашенко, похоже, снова включил ретрансляторы Советник министра обороны «Флэш» пишет, что утренний удар реактивного «Шахеда» по АЗС в Малине мог осуществляться через ретрансляторы на территории Беларуси. От точки удара до границы рф — около 260 км, что слишком далеко для устойчивой работы прямого радиоканала. При этом других дронов, которые могли бы выполнять роль воздушных...
